source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain, pre-1928)
title: View from Haines Mission, Alaska
description: An 1894 photograph showing a view from Haines Mission (the Presbyterian mission that gave the community its name) — a curving beach along Portage Cove with a forested point in the foreground and the snow-covered Chilkat Range rising across the water.
alt: 1894 sepia photograph of a curving beach and forested point at Haines Mission, with the snow-capped Chilkat Range behind
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — downloaded from loc.gov Prints and Photographs Division (ppmsca 08637) via storage-services and visually confirmed
